M/v =Aviona= flag: liberian/ type: bulk carrier
official number: 14706/ call sign: a8wa9/ imo number: 9592745
- telex/phone/fax: inm-c 463710261/773205367/783025672
- built 2011 jul/ yard: cosco (zhoushan) shipyard.
- main engine: mitsui man b&w 6s50mc-c7
- class notation: bv hull. mach bulk carrier. bc-a grab(20) csr,
. hold 2,4 may be  empty , esp, unrestricted navigation,
. aut-ums, veristar-hull, inwatersurvey, mon-shaft.
- p/i: mutual steam ship assurance association (bermuda)
- gt/nt: 33,044.00/19,231.00 international
.        33,919.94/31,634.08 suez
.                 /27,390.00 panama
- summer/winter/tropical dwat and respective draft and tpc:
. summer sw    56,900.0 mt on 12.800 m                58.8
. summer(fw)   56,900.0 mt on 13.088 m                57.5
. winter sw    55,328.2 mt on 12.533 m                58.7
. tropical sw  58,472.2 mt on 13.067 m                58.9
. tropical(fw) 58,472.2 mt on 13.355 m                57.7
. panama       50,508.3 mt on 12.040 m tropical fw 0.9954 gms/cc
- constants excluding fw: 750 mt; light weight 10,782.22 mt; fwa: 288 mm
- can carry bulk cargoes with stowage factor not less than 0.333 m3/mt
. bunkers capacity (98%): 2,170 mt ifo / 121 mt mdo; fw: 465 mt
. ballast 16,742 + ch no.3 14,916 mt. deballasting 30 hours.
- loa: 189.99 m; beam: 32.26  m; moulded depth: 18.00 m; lbp: 185.64 m
. distances: keel to highest point 46.26 m; bow to aft last hatch: 154.5 m
- capacity: grain 71,634.10 m3 holdwise:  bale 68,200.00 m3 holdwise:
. hold 1 -       13,009.86                              12,300.00
. hold 2 -       15,333.25                              14,700.00
. hold 3 -       14,553.08                              14,000.00
. hold 4 -       15,333.27                              14,700.00
. hold 5 -       13,404.64                              12,500.00
- distance from waterline to top hatch coamings:
. laden                  :  no.1 - 7.70 m, nos.2-5 - 7.50 m
. light ballast: #1/16.12 #3/15.26 #5/14.59 m (tf - 5.296 m, ta - 6.440 m)
. heavy ballast condition: #1/13.11 #3/12.64 #5/11.36 m, flooded hold #3
- distance fm waterline to highest point (metres) with full bunkers:
. light ballast 39.560; heavy ballast 36.587; fully laden 33.488.
- holds are co2 fitted; natural ventilation.
- number of gear/grabs and its capacity (wt/cbm):
. 4 deck cranes, 30 mt swl each, type ss300200-280b, wmmp, china.
. between holds no 1-2, 2-3, 3-4, 4-5 fitted on center line
. full cycle with max permissible load 30 mt, working radius max - 28 m /
. min 3.4 m / luffing time abt 71 sec. slewing speed 0.4 rpm; hoisting
. speed: 30 mt x 20 m/min /grab 24 mt x 20m/min
. crane outreach beyond ship side 11.85 m
- 4 ps 5-12m3/24t remote control grabs (capacity 5/6/8/10/12 m3 by  kick
. out plate). tare 8700kg, swl 15.3 mt (when cranes work on grab duty
. the total weight of grab+cargo not to exceed 24 mt). the grabs
. suitable for bulk cargo with density  1.28-3.06 t/m3 and and the
. hardness value less than 400 brinnels.
- hatch covers: steel weather-tight double skin folding type, flat top.
. dimension hatches (m): no.1 - 18.86 x 18.26, no.2,3,4,5 - 21.32 x 18.26
- dimension holds (m) length x breadth x height tt to top hatchcoamings:
. hold 1 - 27.88 x 32.26 x 18.72
. hold 2 - 31.16 x 32.26 x 18.52
. hold 3 - 29.52 x 32.26 x 18.52
. hold 4 - 31.16 x 32.26 x 18.52
. hold 5 - 29.52 x 32.26 x 18.52
. flat tanktop dimensions (m) b x l  breadth fore/aft in:
. hold 1 10.71/23.82x27.88  -   535.11 m2
. hold 2       23.82x28.70  -   683.75 m2
. hold 3       23.82x27.06  -   644.68 m2
. hold 4       23.82x28.70  -   683.75 m2
. hold 5  23.82/9.06x29.52  -   481.28 m2
. total tank  top           - 3,028.57 m2
- strength (permissible loads), mt/m2 of:
. tanktops: hold 1,3,5 - 25 mt/sq.m  hold 2,4 - 20 mt/sq.m
. above tanktop strength applicable for uniform/homogeneous
. bulk cargoes or flat base breakbulk cgoes.
. weather deck: 1.00 mt/sq.m, hatchcovers: 2.3 mt/sq.m for uniform load.
. alternate holds loading: 1-3-5.
speed/daily consumption in good weather conditions defined as maximum
beaufort force 4 and douglas state 3, no swell nor adverse current
ifo grade: vlsfo (max 0.5% s) as per iso 8217:2017(e) not to contain
automotive luboil or other waste chemicals or catalytic fines (si+al).
lsmgo (max 0.1% s) iso 8217:2017(e).
mdo iso 8217:2017(e) designation iso-f-dmb.
about 12.0 knots on about 25.00 mt vlsfo laden
about 12.0 knots on about 24.00 mt vlsfo ballast
about 13.0 knots on about 29.00 mt vlsfo laden
about 13.0 knots on about 28.00 mt vlsfo ballast
plus auxiliary engines about 2.50 mt vlsfo at sea.
in port: vlsfo abt 2.95 mt idle, abt 4.95 mt working,
both at sea and in port always add 0.2 mt/day lsmgo.
the vessel may burn lsmgo when manoeuvring, in narrow waters, canals,
restricted areas, rivers, when entering/leaving the ports.
all details "about" given in good faith but without guarantee
